name: Hullbreaker
short_description: An arena-style 4-player PvP combat game on the high seas with roguelite mechanics. Take the helm as a cursed pirate skeleton captain, blast rivals into splinters, and raise a flag of yer own design o’er the shipwrecks to claim the title of The Pirate King!
detailed_description:
Roadmap

I am looking to add more features to Hullbreaker to enhance the gameplay experience and flesh out more visual content. Here is some of the big additions coming up.

  • AI and PvE Mode - New adventures will await on a more open world experience! Collect loot and upgrade your Hideout with progression based game mode. Also AI ship bots for arena mode

  • New Weapons - A ship is nothing without its supply of armaments, some planned weapon types are Greek Fire, Harpoons, different Cannon types, and Skeleton Row Boat Minions! 

  • More Upgrades - Updates and changes to the upgrade system with upgrades containing both new weapon types and additions to already implemented weapons.

  • Map Additions - Different locations to battle it out with treacherous new hazards. As of right now the volcano is the next planned addition.

  • Visual/Audio Enhancements - Improvements to the look and feel of ships and combat to create an even greater intense experience on the high seas.

Already implemented features present in Hullbreaker.

  • Matchmaking system for both private and public lobbies with support up to 4 players!

  • Deadly weather hazards to avoid such as whirlpools, hurricanes, rogue waves, and volcano eruptions!

  • Wind that effects ship speed and various other mechanics

  • Flag customization

  • Roundshot, Grapeshot, and Chainshot Cannons

  • Mortar

  • Ram

  • Trap Barrels

  • Liars Dice

  • And over 40 upgrades to choose from!


About the Game

Hullbreaker is a multiplayer action roguelike that combines naval warfare with deckbuilding roguelike elements. Customize your ship with different weapons to forge your own vessel to take on other players by clashing on the high seas.

MIX-AND-MATCH DIFFERENT UPGRADE COMBINATIONS!

Apply weapons to your ship to give yourself a peg leg up over other captains. Some of the armaments include cannons and different shot types, long-range mortars, and deadly trap barrels. With upgrades able to boost stats and give unique effects to each one the possibilities are endless for customization!

BECOME THE PIRATE KING

Battle up to 4 other players in a dynamic round based naval experience and utilize your ship to the fullest extent to best other captains. Create unique strategies with your ship and plan out how to counter your foes in the deadly arena.

DYNAMIC ENVIROMENT

The sea is vast and ever-changing, ensuring that each battle is a unique experience. Experience a dynamic realistic ocean simulation that challenges your abilities at the helm with many different weather effects to watch out for like strong gales, whirlpools, hurricanes, and even volcano eruptions! 

CREATE YOUR OWN FLAG!

Fly your flag with pride! Aided by a custom drawing editor that takes your very own design and applies it to your ship in game.
